annotation_info.name: Annotation submitted by DOE Joint Genome Institute

bioprojects.title: Rhodotorula sp. JG-1b Genome sequencing and assembly

assembly_info.comments:
URL -- http://genome.jgi.doe.gov/Rhosp1
JGI Project ID: 1015709
The DNA was provided by Jackie Goordial (jacqueline.goordial@mail.mcgill.ca)
The strain is available from available on request from Dr. Lyle Whyte
Contacts: Jacqueline Goordial (jacqueline.goordial@mail.mcgill.ca)
Assembly and annotation done by JGI.
The JGI and collaborators endorse the principles for the distribution and use of large scale sequencing data adopted by the larger genome sequencing community and urge users of this data to follow them. It is our intention to publish the work of this project in a timely fashion and we welcome collaborative interaction on the project and analysis.
(http://www.genome.gov/page.cfm?pageID=10506376)

bioprojects.title: Integrating cultivation and metagenomics for a multi-kingdom view of skin microbiome diversity and functions

attributes.name: assembly quality
attributes.value: Many fragments with little to no review of assembly other than reporting of standard assembly statistics

attributes.name: binning parameters
attributes.value: MaxBin2, MetaBat2, Concoct with default parameter of the metaWRAP pipeline. Bin refinement module used from metaWRAP with default parameters.

attributes.name: project_name
attributes.value: Metagenomes, cultured reference genomes and metagenome assembled genomes Pure cultures

attributes.name: taxonomic classification
attributes.value: The taxonomy of this Metagenome-Assembled Genome was originally computed with BAT, which assigned the following NCBI taxonomicannotation: 1;131567;2759;33154;4751;451864;5204;29000;162481;231213;1799696;5533;2640191;1305733

description.comment: This sample represents a Third Party Annotation (TPA) metagenome-assembled genome assembled from the metagenomic runs SRR14332516,SRR14332517,SRR14332538,SRR14332539,SRR14332562,SRR14332563,SRR14198843,SRR14198844,SRR14198845 of study SRP314237.
description.title: Metagenome-Assembled Genome: SMGC_7569_bin.1_MetaWRAP_v1.2.1_MAG

biosample.project_name: Metagenomes, cultured reference genomes and metagenome assembled genomes Pure cultures

assembly_info.comments: This is an EMG-produced Third Party Annotation (TPA) bin derived from the primary whole genome shotgun (WGS) data set SRP314237. This sample represents a Metagenome-Assembled Genome (MAG) from the metagenomic runs SRR14332516,SRR14332517,SRR14332538,SRR14332539,SRR14332562,SRR14332563,SRR14198843,SRR14198844,SRR14198845.
